tasks.subject: Task 1: candidate_groups pure helper + module skeleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function grouping active Finding/Bug/Retro nodes by structural signal (parent_id, subtype, tag/file, failed_layer); drop groups < min_size or covered by an existing Pattern's derived-from evidence; deterministic {key, reason, evidence_ids}. No claude.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns.py -k candidate_groups -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns.py -k candidate_groups -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parent_id groups when >=min_size", "subtype/tag/failed_layer groups", "min_size floor drops small groups", "dedup against any-status Pattern evidence subset", "scope=None all; named scope exact", "malformed tags tolerated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: triage_pattern helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move a Pattern open -> confirmed | dismissed; raise on unknown disposition or non-Pattern id. No claude.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns.py -k triage_pattern -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns.py -k triage_pattern -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["confirmed sets status", "dismissed sets status", "bad disposition raises ValueError", "non-Pattern id raises ValueError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: find_patterns_tick driver + _real_confirm seam
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Never-raise single-tick driver. Per group run confirm_fn (default _real_confirm: stage pattern-finder agent + headless run; agent mints via graph). Derive minted from graph; else system dismissed-tombstone; confirm raise -> error + no tombstone. mcp staging gated on db_path AND groups.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns.py -k tick -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns.py -k tick -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["minted recorded when agent mints", "tombstone when agent declines", "confirm raise -> errors, no tombstone", "considered == group count", "no mcp stage when db_path None or no groups", "stage once when db_path+groups, mcp_config passed", "never raises"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: patterns main() CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** --once CLI: parse --once/--scope/--repo/--min-size, resolve db_path, run tick, print JSON. Modeled on orchestrate.main().

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m "not llm" -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/patterns.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_patterns.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m \"not llm\" -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parses --once/--scope/--repo/--min-size", "resolves db, prints valid json with keys", "empty graph considered:0, exit 0, no .mcp.json"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: register triage_pattern MCP tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose patterns.triage_pattern as MCP tool. Bump test_server count 25->26; add roundtrip + bad-disposition tests.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/server.py; Modify mcp-server/tests/test_server.py.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_server.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/server.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_server.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_server.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list_tools includes triage_pattern, count 26", "call_tool sets status returns ok", "bad disposition/non-Pattern -> error payload"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: pattern-finder agent + find-patterns command docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship agents/pattern-finder.md + commands/find-patterns.md with structural doc-guards.

**Files:** Create agents/pattern-finder.md; Create commands/find-patterns.md; Modify mcp-server/tests/test_agent_docs.py.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_agent_docs.py -k "pattern_finder or find_patterns" -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/pattern-finder.md", "commands/find-patterns.md", "mcp-server/tests/test_agent_docs.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_agent_docs.py -k \"pattern_finder or find_patterns\" -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["agent frontmatter name+model sonnet, create_node+link_nodes+derived-from, reject coincidence", "command argument-hint, query_graph, triage_pattern", "doc tests pass, fast suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: live llm-marked e2e (3 findings -> confirmed Pattern)
tasks.note: Live-validated 2026-05-24: 1 passed in 27.42s. Real pattern-finder agent mined 3 findings into one open Pattern (full derived-from trail); triaged to confirmed.
tasks.description:
**Goal:** llm-marked e2e with REAL _real_confirm: 3 findings sharing parent -> agent mints one open Pattern linked derived-from all 3 -> triage to confirmed. Structured graph assertions only.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/tests/test_patterns_e2e.py.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns_e2e.py -m llm -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/tests/test_patterns_e2e.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_patterns_e2e.py -m llm -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["llm-marked + skipif no claude", "real _real_confirm, only db_path/repo/source_root", "one minted open Pattern linked derived-from all 3", "triage to confirmed", "structured assertions only"]}
```
